creator: joel@tahoestores.com
text:
(In reply to Oliver Lehmann from comment #2)

Thanks for the feedback. I checked the conf file and changed it to:

# Milter specific options
Socket = local:/var/run/pyspf-milter/pyspf-milter.sock
#Socket = inet:8893@localhost

And that did the trick along with fixing up the permissions by changing the group to postfix.

One less warning message to look at!
